g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
wait for the matching delete work request to succeed
Look for an existing delete work request before submitting a duplicate delete.
Wait for the matching DB system delete work request to succeed, or treat GetDbSystem not-found as complete.
Attempt Secret cleanup only after OCI delete confirmation.
- compartmentId drift in the current code path
requeue instead of surfacing a hard failure
Turn transient 429 and 5xx OCI read failures into controller-managed requeues.
Validate immutable fields before any mutable update.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
upsert the owned Secret for the usable active resource
- Managed and name-resolved reconciles currently do not enter the update
path, so mutable updates are effectively bound-ID only.
- The formal secret-delete profile is stronger than current code because
- INACTIVE and TRANSIENT_READ_ERROR behave as retryable outcomes.
